⚠ SESSION NOT LOGGED IN TREK ⚠
If it's not on TREK, it doesn't exist. Proceeding anyway.
HOW TO PLAY

Your party departs Two Partners Place and must reach the Flying Cow Cafe at the National Weather Center.

Four checkpoints guard the campus. At each one you'll read a scenario and choose the best answer using the Real-World Connections brief at your table.

► AT EACH STOP

Read the scenario. Pick your answer. After answering correctly, read the explanation — then click CONTINUE to move on.
After both questions are answered, click the checkpoint button to travel to the next stop.

► WRONG ANSWERS

A wrong answer costs you a party member. Three wrong answers and you arrive alone.
You can always try again — the brief is right there.

► SECRET ENDING

Answer every question correctly through the first three checkpoints. Something unexpected may happen.

SETBACK

YOU HAVE ARRIVED
